---
name: Behaviour profile suggestion
about: Suggest a new behaviour profile or improvements to an existing one
labels: behaviour-profile
---

## Summary

Provide a concise description of the profile idea or improvement.

## Current behaviour profile gap

Explain what is missing, confusing, or under-served in the current profile set.

## Suggested profile behaviour

Describe the tone, priorities, trade-offs, and engineering stance you want this profile to encourage.

## Example use cases

List a few example tasks or workflows where this profile would be useful.

## Additional context

Add examples of expected prompt style, wording, or similar tools if helpful.
